title: thymophylla setifolia var. radiata
intro: Thymophylla setifolia var. radiata, also known as radiate thymophylla or radiate bush sunflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thymophylla setifolia var. radiata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate skin irritations, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
